capabilities.tokenNote: No design tokens (Figma Variables or Shared Styles) were found in the selected components. CSS values are emitted as literal fallbacks. Connect variables in Figma to enable token-driven CSS var() references.

Size.description: Visual size — affects CSS styles only. Becomes a className-based prop.

screens.name: Checkout/Payment processing
screens.layout: 402px × 874px; vertical flex; gap: 0px; align: start; justify: start; min-height: 874px; background-color: #eae8ed; overflow: clip; border-radius: 0px; box-shadow: var(--effect-style-cards-normal)

tree.name: Body
tree.layout: fill × fill; vertical flex; gap: 16px; padding: var(spacing/stack/xl) var(spacing/density/md) var(spacing/stack/md) var(spacing/density/md); align: center; justify: center; flex-grow: 1

children.name: Container
children.layout: fill × hug; vertical flex; gap: 8px; align: start; justify: start

children.name: Heading
children.layout: fill × hug; vertical flex; gap: var(spacing/stack/sm); align: center; justify: center

children.name: Label
children.layout: fill × hug; vertical flex; gap: var(spacing/stack/md); align: center; justify: start

children.name: Payment processing
children.style: color: var(--text-brand); font-family: "Post Office Digital HL", sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 140%

children.name: Row
children.layout: fill × hug; horizontal flex; gap: 10px; align: center; justify: start

children.name: Please wait while we securely process your payment
children.content: Please wait while we securely process your payment
children.style: color: var(--text-brand); font-family: "Nunito Sans", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 150%
